title: Engineering through production systems.
description: Timeline, roles, and the platforms that shaped how I build.

milestones.title: Joined Bridging Healthcare Technologies
milestones.detail: Started building production systems across healthcare and FinTech product lines.

milestones.title: Credee FinTech Platform
milestones.detail: Shipped payment flows, contracts, and money-adjacent architecture with Stripe at the core.

milestones.title: Stripe production systems
milestones.detail: Webhook-driven state, dynamic fees, and idempotent recovery paths under real payment load.

milestones.title: Practina AI Platform
milestones.detail: Built AI marketing workflows with OpenAI, queues, retries, and cost-aware generation pipelines.

milestones.title: Systems ownership & leadership
milestones.detail: Owned Redis, BullMQ, AWS, and MySQL paths — from design decisions to production incident response.

milestones.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
milestones.detail: Nearly five years shipping scalable backend systems, FinTech, and AI integrations end to end.

milestones.title: Open to the next challenge
milestones.detail: Looking for senior roles where production architecture, payments, and AI systems actually matter.
